description: The main window, the app-defined commands (health / scan_inventory / market / top_sellables / tray, plus probe-only), and the window controls the tray + close-to-tray lifecycle drives (close/hide/show/is-visible). App-defined and Rust-fired commands (incl. the Rust-side notification) need no ACL entry in Tauri v2; core:default covers the window basics.
